name: Basil Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Green Beans, fresh, cut into 2-inch pieces
1 tablespoon Butter Buds®, or butter, melted
1 1/2 teaspoons Fresh Basil, minced, or 1/2 teaspoon Dry Basil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine beans, onion, celery, and water.
2. Cover and cook for 5 minutes or until beans are tender.
3. Drain the beans.
4. Add butter, basil, salt, and pepper; stir to coat.
5. Serve immediately.
Yield: 2 servings
